ogTitle: Coasters Retreat vs Cobaki Lakes: Climate Safety

heading: Coasters Retreat vs Cobaki Lakes — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coasters Retreat, New South Wales and Cobaki Lakes, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cobaki Lakes has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Coasters Retreat (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coasters Retreat or Cobaki Lakes safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coasters Retreat has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Cobaki Lakes scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coasters Retreat scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Cobaki Lakes scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coasters Retreat or Cobaki Lakes?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cobaki Lakes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
